results.title: ‘I'm Looking Forward to Coming Back’: Lalit Modi Set for India Return After Major Relief in 16-Year-Old IPL FEMA Case
results.description: IPL founder Lalit Modi plans to return to India after 16 years following a major verdict by the SAFEMA Appellate Tribunal clearing him in the 2009 FEMA case.

results.title: India bank on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi-Abhishek Sharma firepower; Rinku Singh set for comeback vs Zimbabwe
results.description: India are set to unleash an explosive opening pair of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Abhishek Sharma in the first T20I against Zimbabwe, while Rinku Singh is expected to return to the middle order. Here's India's probable playing XI and key selection calls for the series opener.

results.title: IIT Madras to host symposium to advance country's semiconductor future
results.description: The symposium aligns with the union government's vision to establish India as a trusted global hub for semiconductor design, electronics manufacturing, and secure digital infrastructure.

results.title: 4 slogans cleared by CJP for protesters to chant at Jantar Mantar
results.description: Speaking from the protest site at Jantar Mantar, Ashutosh Ranka said ‘negative slogans’ must be avoided since ‘they are looking for a chance to make a narrative’.

results.title: Rohit Chandel POCSO Case: Durga Star Aashay Mishra Replaces Actor As Sairaab Lead
results.description: Following Rohit Chandel's arrest in a POCSO case, Durga actor Aashay Mishra has replaced him as the lead in Sairaab and has reportedly begun filming.
